title: Martin Danielsson
text: Home * People * Martin Danielsson Martin Danielsson [1] Martin Danielsson , a Swedish electrical engineer, M.Sc. from Lund University in 1999 [2] , and as computer chess programmer author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol and UCI compliant chess engine Marvin , originally developed in the early 2000s until 2005, first released in May 2004 [3] . After ten years "out of business", Martin Danielsson restarted the development in 2015 - the completely rewritten Marvin 2.0.0 was released as open source engine under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL3) in March 2017 [4] .
